name: Bayut UAE and Saudi Arabia Real Estate Portal API
what_it_does: Bayut UAE and Saudi Arabia real estate portal REST API for real estate agents and property developers to syndicate property listings, access MENA property market data, manage buyer and renter enquiries, and analyze the UAE and Saudi Arabia property markets — the leading property portal in the UAE owned by Dubizzle Group (Emerging Markets Property Group). Enables AI agents to manage property listing for UAE/Saudi property syndication automation, handle listing update for property status management automation, access property search for Dubai and Riyadh buyer discovery automation, retrieve market insights for MENA property price trend automation, manage enquiry lead for agent CRM automation, handle verification for TruCheck listing quality automation, access area guide for neighborhood data automation, retrieve sold prices for comparable market analysis automation, manage developer project for off-plan property automation, and integrate Bayut with CRM systems and UAE real estate management platforms for end-to-end MENA property automation.
use_cases: Syndicating Dubai and Abu Dhabi property listings to Bayut for UAE estate agency automation agents
Accessing UAE real estate market data and price trends for property investment research automation agents
Managing buyer and renter enquiry leads from Bayut for UAE estate agency CRM automation agents
Publishing off-plan developer project listings for UAE property developer marketing automation agents
not_for: Non-UAE/Saudi Arabia property markets (Bayut focuses on UAE and Saudi Arabia; sister site Lamudi for other MENA)
Transaction processing (Bayut is marketing portal, not property transaction platform)
Consumer property search apps (Bayut API is for real estate agent and developer partners)
best_when: A UAE or Saudi Arabia real estate agent, property developer, or PropTech platform wanting AI agents to syndicate listings and access MENA property market data through Bayut's leading UAE property portal.
avoid_when: RERA LICENSE REQUIRED: UAE real estate listings require RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Agency) registration; automated unlicensed listing upload creates regulatory violation; automated UAE agents must hold valid RERA license number for listing on Bayut. TruCheck VERIFICATION: Bayut's TruCheck verified listings require physical property verification; automated unverified listing assumption misses TruCheck badge benefit; automated must complete physical verification for premium listing quality. AGENT MEMBERSHIP REQUIRED: Bayut API requires active agent or developer membership subscription; automated self-service API key assumption creates membership required; automated must be registered Bayut member with active subscription. ARABIC LANGUAGE CONSIDERATIONS: UAE property market has significant Arabic-speaking audience; automated English-only listing creates reduced market reach; automated should consider Arabic language listing content for maximum exposure.

auth.notes: Bayut uses API key for registered agent/developer authentication. REST API with JSON. Dubai, UAE HQ. Founded 2008. Dubizzle Group / Emerging Markets Property Group (EMPG). Products: Residential and commercial property listings, TruCheck verification, market intelligence, off-plan projects, agent directory. SDKs: None public. UAE and Saudi Arabia primary markets. RERA (Dubai), DLD (Dubai Land Department) compliant. 1M+ properties listed. Competes with Property Finder for UAE property portal dominance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Agent membership required; API included with subscription; no free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Agent subscription: monthly fee based on listing package; developer: project-based pricing
pricing.notes: Dubai UAE. EMPG/Dubizzle Group. Subscription-based. RERA license required. UAE/Saudi Arabia.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; listing management throttled per subscription tier; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: RERA LICENSE NUMBER REQUIRED: UAE property listings require valid RERA agent registration number; automated listing without RERA number creates regulatory non-compliance; automated UAE listings must include valid RERA license

AGENT MEMBERSHIP IS PREREQUISITE: Bayut API requires active agent subscription membership; automated developer API key assumption creates membership_required error; automated must be subscribed Bayut agent or developer

NO WEBHOOKS FOR LEAD NOTIFICATIONS: Bayut does not provide webhooks for lead enquiries; automated webhook lead notification assumption creates missed leads; automated must implement polling or use Bayut's CRM integration for lead retrieval

PROPERTY PERMIT NUMBER FOR RENTALS: Dubai rental listings require DLD Trakheesi permit number; automated rental listing without permit creates listing rejection; automated must include valid Ejari/Trakheesi permit for rental listings

ARABIC CONTENT FOR MAXIMUM REACH: UAE property market has significant Arabic-language audience; automated English-only listing creates reduced visibility; automated should provide Arabic translations for title and description fields
agent_readiness.security_notes: UAE/Saudi property portal. RERA, DLD, UAE data protection, PDPL-SA. API key. AE/SA. Property and customer data.

security_score_components.security_notes: UAE/Saudi property. RERA, DLD, PDPL-SA. API key. AE/SA. Property listing and customer data.
